scripts.db:push: bash scripts/db-forward.sh pnpm --filter server exec sh -c 'set -a && . ../../.env.database && DB_HOST=localhost drizzle-kit push --force'
scripts.db:migrate:dev: bash scripts/db-forward.sh pnpm --filter server exec sh -c 'set -a && . ../../.env.database && DB_HOST=localhost tsx migrate.ts'
scripts.db:baseline:dev: bash scripts/db-forward.sh pnpm --filter server exec sh -c 'set -a && . ../../.env.database && DB_HOST=localhost tsx baseline.ts'
scripts.db:backfill-tz:dev: bash scripts/db-forward.sh pnpm --filter server exec sh -c 'set -a && . ../../.env.database && DB_HOST=localhost tsx backfill-source-tz.ts'
scripts.db:seed: bash scripts/db-forward.sh pnpm --filter server exec sh -c 'set -a && . ../../.env.database && DB_HOST=localhost tsx src/db/seed.ts ../../sample.kif'
